name: Coconut-Pineapple Cream Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 12 oz container frozen whipped topping, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
2. Grease a 13-inch x 9-inch x 2-inch pan.
3. Prepare the cake mix according to package directions. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan.
4. Bake for 35 to 40 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean. Cool in the pan for 15 minutes; then remove from the pan and let cool on a wire rack.
5. In a small bowl of an electric mixer, beat the cream cheese with the coconut milk and pudding until smooth.
6. Spread the mixture over the cooled cake.
7. Spoon the drained pineapple over the pudding.
8. Cover with whipped topping.
9. Sprinkle with shredded coconut.
10. Chill before serving.
This is a GREAT recipe and reminds me of one my mom used to make for picnics or trips to the beach (lost her recipe). It's been a favorite of mine for Little League and Pot Luck Suppers. EVERYONE loves it! I leave it in the pan!
